ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "country_area" INTEGER /* Identifier for the country or area */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group, defined in years */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the population (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "population" REAL /* Total population count for the specified parameters */,
  "urban_rural" TEXT /* Urban or rural population ( Urban: U, Rural: R) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the data (scale: 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_area FOREIGN KEY ("country_area") REFERENCES countries ("country_area")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_area" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or area */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or area */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region of the country (e.g., South Asia, Western Europe) */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., High, Upper-middle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_area")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start of the age range */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., census, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "collection_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "collection_method_type" TEXT /* Type of collection method (e.g., in-person, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "data_quality_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "data_quality_metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality metric */,
  "data_quality_metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data download) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
